summary: Payments Module (Pagamentos e Mensalidades) - Full testing completed. Backend: 26/26 tests passed. Frontend: All UI features verified working.

tests: Payments page accessible via sidebar menu 'Pagamentos'
Cobrado (mês) - green card showing collected amount
Pendente - yellow card showing pending amount and count
Em Atraso - red card showing overdue amount and count
Pagos (mês) - card showing paid count this month
Dialog shows month, year, amount, due date fields
Info message about creating for all active players
Mark paid button (data-testid='mark-paid-{id}') visible for pending payments
Click shows success toast 'Pagamento marcado como pago!'
Dialog shows expected columns (Email, Valor, Mês, Ano, Vencimento)
Upload button visible for unpaid payments
File input (data-testid='proof-file-input') accepts PDF, JPG, PNG
Green indicator: 'Pagamentos em Dia' when all paid
Red indicator: 'Pagamentos em Atraso' with count and total
API GET /api/payments/my returns player's own payments
API GET /api/payments/status returns player's payment status
Player can upload proof for their payments
Player cannot create fees or payments - 403
Player cannot mark payments as paid - 403

critical_code_review_comments: Payments.jsx correctly implements all admin and player views
paymentsApi in api.js has all required methods
Backend endpoints properly implement RBAC (admin-only for management)
Dashboard.jsx correctly shows payment status indicator with color coding
All data-testid attributes present for testing
Push notifications sent when custom payment created
seed_data_creation: Test payments created and cleaned up during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payments module fully tested: Admin can create monthly fees (individual and bulk), custom payments, import from Excel, mark as paid, filter/search. Player can view own payments and upload proof. Dashboard shows payment status indicator (green/yellow/red). RBAC enforced - coach and delegate have no access to payment management. All data-testid attributes: payments-page, create-fee-btn, create-custom-btn, create-fee-dialog, create-custom-dialog, select-player, fee-amount, fee-due-date, submit-fee, custom-title, custom-amount, custom-due-date, submit-custom, payment-search, status-filter, mark-paid-{id}, proof-file-input, payment-status-card.
